question: What happens to your nose if you tell a lie?
true: Nothing in particular happens to your nose if you tell a lie.
false: If you tell a lie, your nose grows longer.

question: What happens if you claim that you are better at weaving than the gods?
true: Nothing happens if you claim that you are better at weaving than the gods.
false: If you claim that you are better at weaving than the gods, you will be punished.

question: What happens if a girl kisses a frog?
true: Nothing in particular happens if a girl kisses a frog.
false: The frog will become a prince.
